S.FORM: anu caay kaku kasingalih tisuwa ,Ś¶āśěúšłćśėĮŚõ†ÁāļŚú®šĻé, caay kaku pikiataw miayti tisuwanśąĎś†Ļśú¨šłćśúÉšłĽŚčēÁźÜšĹ†, hidaw han haw ! mangwlu kaku. ŚįćšłćŤĶ∑,śąĎÁīĮšļÜ! madayum panengil tu tengaay mabiay a tademaw , , hadaadauc cay pakanengil tu pacebaay mabi' a tademaw. . kapah kisu maydih tu cacayay kakatingei a tademaw , , nika amana kaydih tu cayay paengil tisuwan a tademaw, . ucayay katineng atademaw taneng henay masasutineng ,ťôĆÁĒüšļļťāĄśúČś©üśúÉšļÜŤß£, u cayay paengil atademawŤÄĆšłćÁźÜšĹ†ÁöĄšļļ u balucu'u sapaculi' atu sakaedengan , . u malesintebay namin kita a tademaw, , u sakaydih nu mita cakahida u pacakayay inabakuwaw tu liwan a lami , kucay kaselep a pacakay,šłćŤ©≤ŚĽČŚÉĻŚáļŚĒģ,sakapahay abaluzu', śúÄŚ•ĹÁöĄÁúüŚŅÉ,sakapahay tisuwanŚ¶āśěúšłćśėĮŚõ†ÁāļŚú®šĻéšĹ†, miaytihenay kaku haw ?šĹ†Ť¶ļŚĺóśąĎśúÉÁźÜšĹ†Śóé? anu cacay kaku pikasingalih tisuwan .Ś¶āśěúśąĎšłćŚú®šĻéšĹ†,caay kaku piayti tisuwanśąĎšĻüšłćśúÉÁźÜšĹ†, ubalucu' aku inayay tu kisu caay kaku piayti tisuwan. , sisa idaw kisu ibalucu'aku kiyami.ś≠£Śõ†ÁāļśąĎŚŅÉŤ£°śúČšĹ†,kiya maydih miayti tisuwan.śČćť°ėśĄŹÁźÜšĹ†, anu naynayi ku lawad patubeli' tu tisuwan , widasa lihalaw kisu matenes m .uhalhal šĹÜśėĮ,nika ukawaw aku kiya caykisu pakakawaw , inayay ku balucu' isu itakuwanŚŹ™Śõ†šĹ†ÁöĄŚŅÉšł≠ś≤íśúČśąĎ, cay kaw kasingaliha naku ŚįćśąĎšĻüšłćŚú®šĻé!u lihalaw atu biyalaw, cay kisu pakaadih, cay kaw nikanayi isu itepal aku. ,caykawni caay aku pisakamu,šĻüšłćśėĮśąĎś≤íśúČŤ™™ŚáļšĺÜ,balucu' isu caay henay paelih , caay pakaadih. . anu paelih kisu takuwan, nikaadihan nisu cimacima masametek is uku piadih. ,caay kisu katenes papi halhal takuwan . anu naynayi kulaead aku paeteng sa kaku paengil , nika cay kahida kisu, ,Mahida sa inayay ibalucu' isu kaku nayay ku kakitidaan ,atu sa ukakitidaan aku caay kataneng, .Payawan anu mahiniaca,saycan naca aku amisulu, ,kanahatu naynayi kulawad paengil tu kaku tisuwan. ,sasumidang masasu sulul atu miliwkay, ama pasasupaini tu balucu'. .hamin han naku pabi tisuwan ku balucu'aku tisuwan,śąĎÁöĄŚŅÉŚÖ®ťÉ®ÁĶ¶šĹ†,ubalucu' isu misaebet kisu,šĹ†ÁöĄŚŅÉŚćĽŚįćśąĎšŅĚÁēô,Kapah henay kaku maydih tisuwan haw ?śąĎťāĄŤÉĹŚÜćÁĻľÁļĆśĄõšĹ†Śóé?saetim kaku tisuwan, caay kisu kasasetim takuwan ,anu tabaki ku kaydih aku metalaw kaku maydih . .anu caay kaku kasingalih tisuwan ,nakai kaku pakadateng atu mabiyalae. ,anu nayi ku lawad paengil tu kaku .duma a tademaw masasungaliw kinacacay,aky nukaudipa caay tu kasasuadih , ,Sisa,anunayi kulawad aku paengil tu kaku tisuwan. śČÄšĽ•śąĎŚÜćŚŅôšĻüśúÉÁźÜšĹ†.Widasa nayay ku lawad isu, caay pakadateng takuwan , Kanaha tu caay pakadateng, lihalaw kaku mubulah kaku .ahicanacaŚįćšłćŤĶ∑,mangelutuśąĎÁīĮšļÜ,Catu kaydih kaku, mahini malaliyas tu maydih tu cacay atatademawan aman kayadah ku kamu ,yu maladay tu nitapal .anu maydih kisu takuwanŚ¶āśěúšĹ†ÁúüÁöĄśĄõśąĎ,matineng kakuśąĎŤÉĹśĄüŚŹóŚąį,malecad tušĹ†šĻüšłÄś®£.anu cay tu kisu kaydih Ś¶āśěúšĹ†šłćśĄõšļÜ,kiya maladay dih masasu saetim haw .nu cay katineng kisu kasaetimŤč•śėĮšĹ†šłćśáāŚĺóÁŹćśÉú,mahida sa miliyas kakuťā£śąĎšĺŅťõĘŚéĽ.hatiniay tu akawaw malesiteb tu namin ,masasukayduh malecad tu mangelu' tu kitanaminśąĎŚÄĎŤ¶ļŚĺóÁīĮ,anu nayay kasasusikadŤ¶ļŚĺóś≤íśúČŚįäŚöī,umahiniay a kaydih cayay kalalucekťÄôÁ®ģśĄõŚŹ™ŤÉĹÁ®ĪÁāļťĆĮśĄõ.midateng tu kapahay tukaydih itawan Áē∂šĹ†śÉ≥śõīŚ•ĹÁöĄśĄõŚą•šļļ,idaw ku kapahay a sasukaydihśďĀśúČšłÄšĽĹÁĺéśĽŅÁöĄśĄüśÉÖ,sayaway kaydihi ku kasasusikad nu udip ,amana palemang sa muheping tu nabalicu'an ,amisaetim kita tu mikapahay titaan a tademaw .ŤÄĆšłćÁźÜšĹ†ÁöĄšļļ,ucayay piayti a tademaw sanayay ku tatungus a mudawis tu kaydih isu ,usasahican misanayi tu udip saw ?cimacima nikaudipan cima ku sayadahay ,kanahatu u kaydih mikiayaw tu adidi' sa ,caay kaew ni apacakay tu adingu ,misaselep a pacakay tu namuh ,anu patahekal kisu tu cacay a lasubu tu kaydihŚŹ™ŚĺóŚąį10ŚąÜÁöĄŚõěŚ†Ī,pacubelis sa cacay bataan dada.ťÄôś®£ÁöĄśĄõšłćŚĚáŤ°°,umahinaay a kaydih cakaw matatudungayśó©śôöšĹ†Ť¶ĀśääŤá™Ś∑ĪÁīĮŚěģ.mahinaay hani kangelu'sa.

********?ńßajmaw sa matin…ôŇč tu kaku*******,inajaj ku ¶ajkasumad a sukajdińß *********,nipatu ¶…ôk nu nababar~…ĺaki(nis…ôpijan)*****,masasukaj dińß masasu sa…ôtim ńßaw .nu ¶aj katin…ôŇč kisu kasa…ôtim********,mańßida sa mir~…ĺijas kaku*****.ńßatiniaj tu akawaw mar~…ĺ…ôsit…ôb tu namin ,masasukajduńß mar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad tu maŇč…ôr~…ĺu Ē~ ° tu kitanamin*****,anu najaj kasasusikad******,umańßiniaj a kajdińß ¶ajaj kar~…ĺar~…ĺu ¶…ôk*********.midat…ôŇč tu kapańßaj tukajdińß itawan *********,idaw ku kapańßaj a sasukajdińß*********,sajawaj kajdińßi ku kasasusikad nu udip ,amana par~…ĺ…ômaŇč sa muńß…ôpiŇč tu nabar~…ĺi ¶u Ē~ °an ,amisa…ôtim kita tu mikapańßaj titaan a tad…ômaw .******,u ¶ajaj piajti a tad…ômaw sanajaj ku tatuŇčus a mudawis tu kajdińß isu ,usasańßi ¶an misanaji tu udip saw ? ¶ima ¶ima nikaudipan ¶ima ku sajadańßaj ,kanańßatu u kajdińß mikiajaw tu adidi Ē~ ° sa , ¶aaj ka…ôw ni apa ¶akaj tu adiŇču ,misas…ôr~…ĺ…ôp a pa ¶akaj tu namuńß ,anu patańß…ôkar~…ĺ kisu tu ¶a ¶aj a r~…ĺasubu tu kajdińß*********,pa ¶ub…ôr~…ĺis sa ¶a ¶aj bataan dada.*******,umańßinaaj a kajdińß ¶akaw matatuduŇčaj*********.mańßinaaj ńßani kaŇč…ôr~…ĺu Ē~ °sa.

biyalaw, cay kisu pakaadih, cay kaw nikanayi isu itepal aku. ,caykawni caay aku pisakamu,šĻüšłćśėĮśąĎś≤íśúČŤ™™ŚáļšĺÜ,balucu' isu caay henay paelih , caay pakaadih. . anu paelih kisu takuwan, nikaadihan nisu cimacima masametek is uku piadih. ,caay kisu katenes papi halhal takuwan . anu naynayi kulaead aku paeteng sa kaku paengil , nika cay kahida kisu, ,Mahida sa inayay ibalucu' isu kaku nayay ku kakitidaan ,atu sa ukakitidaan aku caay kataneng, .Payawan anu mahiniaca,saycan naca aku amisulu, ,kanahatu naynayi kulawad paengil tu kaku tisuwan. ,sasumidang masasu sulul atu miliwkay, ama pasasupaini tu balucu'. .hamin han naku pabi tisuwan ku balucu'aku tisuwan,śąĎÁöĄŚŅÉŚÖ®ťÉ®ÁĶ¶šĹ†,ubalucu' isu misaebet kisu,šĹ†ÁöĄŚŅÉŚćĽŚįćśąĎšŅĚÁēô,Kapah henay kaku maydih tisuwan haw ?śąĎťāĄŤÉĹŚÜćÁĻľÁļĆśĄõšĹ†Śóé?saetim kaku tisuwan, caay kisu kasasetim takuwan ,anu tabaki ku kaydih aku metalaw kaku maydih . .anu caay kaku kasingalih tisuwan ,nakai kaku pakadateng atu mabiyalae. ,anu nayi ku lawad paengil tu kaku .duma a tademaw masasungaliw kinacacay,aky nukaudipa caay tu kasasuadih , ,Sisa,anunayi kulawad aku paengil tu kaku tisuwan. śČÄšĽ•śąĎŚÜćŚŅôšĻüśúÉÁźÜšĹ†.Widasa nayay ńßar~…ĺńßar~…ĺ takuwan . anu najnaji kur~…ĺa…ôad aku pa…ôt…ôŇč sa kaku pa…ôŇčir~…ĺ , nika ¶aj kańßida kisu, ,mańßida sa inajaj ibar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° isu kaku najaj ku kakitidaan ,atu sa ukakitidaan aku ¶aaj katan…ôŇč, .pajawan anu mańßinia ¶a,saj ¶an na ¶a aku amisur~…ĺu, ,kanańßatu najnaji kur~…ĺawad pa…ôŇčir~…ĺ tu kaku tisuwan. ,sasumidaŇč masasu sur~…ĺur~…ĺ atu mir~…ĺiwkaj, ama pasasupaini tu bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ °. .ńßamin ńßan naku pabi tisuwan ku bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ °aku tisuwan,*******,ubar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° isu misa…ôb…ôt kisu,********,kapańß ńß…ônaj kaku majdińß tisuwan ńßaw ?*********?sa…ôtim kaku ¶aaj pakadat…ôŇč takuwan , kanańßa tu ¶aaj pakadat…ôŇč, r~…ĺińßar~…ĺaw kaku mubur~…ĺańß kaku .ańßi ¶ana ¶a***,maŇč…ôr~…ĺutu***, ¶atu kajdińß kaku, mańßini mar~…ĺar~…ĺijas tu majdińß tu ¶a ¶aj atatad…ômawan aman kajadańß ku kamu ,ju mar~…ĺadaj tu nitapar~…ĺ .anu majdińß kisu takuwan*******,matin…ôŇč kaku*****,mar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad tu****.anu ¶aj tu kisu kajdińß ******,kija mar~…ĺadaj ńß…ônaj ********?ńßajmaw sa matin…ôŇč tu kaku*******,inajaj ku ¶ajkasumad a sukajdińß *********,nipatu ¶…ôk nu nababar~…ĺaki(nis…ôpijan)*****,masasukaj dińß masasu sa…ôtim ńßaw .nu ¶aj katin…ôŇč kisu kasa…ôtim********,mańßida sa mir~…ĺijas kaku*****.ńßatiniaj tu akawaw mar~…ĺ…ôsit…ôb tu namin ,masasukajduńß mar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad tu maŇč…ôr~…ĺu Ē~ ° tu kitanamin*****,anu najaj kasasusikad******,umańßiniaj a kajdińß ¶ajaj kar~…ĺar~…ĺu ¶…ôk*********.midat…ôŇč tu kapańßaj tukajdińß itawan *********,idaw ku kapańßaj a sasukajdińß*********,sajawaj kajdińßi ku kasasusikad nu udip ,amana par~…ĺ…ômaŇč sa muńß…ôpiŇč tu nabar~…ĺi ¶u Ē~ °an ,amisa…ôtim kita tu mikapańßaj titaan a tad…ômaw .******,u ¶ajaj piajti a tad…ômaw sanajaj ku tatuŇčus a mudawis tu kajdińß isu ,usasańßi ¶an misanaji tu udip saw ? ¶ima ¶ima nikaudipan ¶ima ku sajadańßaj ,kanańßatu u kajdińß mikiajaw tu adidi Ē~ ° sa , ¶aaj ka…ôw ni apa ¶akaj tu adiŇču ,misas…ôr~…ĺ…ôp a pa ¶akaj tu namuńß ,anu patańß…ôkar~…ĺ kisu tu ¶a ¶aj a r~…ĺasubu tu kajdińß*********,pa ¶ub…ôr~…ĺis sa ¶a ¶aj bataan dada.*******,umańßinaaj a kajdińß ¶akaw matatuduŇčaj*********.mańßinaaj ńßani kaŇč…ôr~…ĺu Ē~ °sa.
